「送りっぱなし」が招く恐ろしいセキュリティリスク: The Hidden Security Risks of "Send and Forget"
FS!QRでは、ファイルをアップロードする際に、状況に応じて保持期間を柔軟に選択: FS!QR lets you choose a retention period flexibly at upload time. Use the guidelines below to get the most out of its security benefits.
一般的に普及している多くのクラウドストレージやファイル共有サービスは、データを長: Most mainstream cloud storage and file-sharing services are designed primarily for long-term saving and archiving. But for temporary file handoffs — passing along meeting materials, sharing photos during an event, or sending a quote to a client — is there really any need to keep the data around forever?
一時的な共有データがサーバーに残り続けることは、セキュリティリスクになるだけでな: Temporary shared data lingering on a server doesn't just create a security risk — it also needlessly consumes storage capacity and generates wasteful running costs in the form of power and hardware resources.
ファイルをアップロードして生成した共有リンクを、メールやチャットで相手に伝えた後: After generating a share link and sending it by email or chat, do you remember actually going back to "delete" the file or link? Most people feel satisfied the moment the handoff is done and simply forget the file exists, leaving it sitting there. This conceals the following risks.
必要なときにだけデータが存在し、不要になれば即座に消えるという循環は、環境負荷を: A cycle where data exists only when needed and disappears when no longer needed also aligns with the Green IT idea of reducing environmental impact. Auto-delete can also help support the data minimization principle, which appears in privacy frameworks such as Japan's Act on the Protection of Personal Information and the EU's GDPR.

チャットツールやメールのアカウントが万が一乗っ取られた際、過去ログに残っている「: If a chat or email account is ever hijacked, every "still valid" share link sitting in the message history can be used to download years' worth of confidential files.
プロジェクトが終了したり、メンバーが退職したりした後も、古い共有リンクが生き続け: Old share links that stay alive after a project ends or a member leaves, quietly leaving the door open for former members to access the data whenever they like.
放置された共有URLが、何らかの理由で第三者に渡ったり、検索エンジンのクローラー: The risk that a forgotten share URL ends up in the wrong hands, or gets discovered by search-engine crawlers or rogue scraping programs, exposing confidential data.

FS!QRは、「保存」ではなく「共有（受け渡し）」そのものにフォーカスして設計さ: FS!QR is designed for sharing and handoff rather than long-term storage. When the retention period ends, its auto-delete feature removes the share data and registration records managed by the service. This reduces cleanup work and the time an old link remains active; the guide explains safe operation and points to check.
指定した保持期間が終了すると、システムはデータベース上の登録情報を削除し、サービ: After the selected period, the system removes the database record and files held by the service. It does not promise to erase backups or copies on a user's device, so check your storage and device policies for sensitive material. Its practical benefit is keeping a share active only as long as needed.
相手がすぐにダウンロードできる場合に向いています。期限切れ前に受け取りが完了する: Use this when the recipient can download immediately. Confirm completion through another channel before the link expires.
会議、イベント、業務時間内の受け渡しなど、相手が同日に確認する予定の場合に向いて: Use these for meetings, events, and business-day exchanges. Choose only the time needed and consider manual deletion after delivery.
時差がある相手や翌日までの確認が必要な場合に向いています。24時間を超えて保管し: Use this when time zones or next-day confirmation matter. Move material needing more than 24 hours, audit retention, or contractual storage to formal storage.
FS!QRの自動削除機能を利用すれば、仮に送信者が削除作業を忘れてしまっても、あ: If a sender forgets to clean up, FS!QR still runs the service-side deletion at the chosen time. This shortens the period an old share is left unattended; combine it with manual deletion and device cleanup when appropriate.
